nasb.text: when we are slandered, we try to conciliate; we have become as the scum of the world, the dregs of all things, even until now.

esv.text: when slandered, we entreat. We have become, and are still, like the scum of the world, the refuse of all things.

cnv.text: 被人毀謗，我們卻好好地勸導；直到現在，人還是把我們當作世上的垃圾，萬物的渣滓。

ccb.text: 被人毁谤，就好言相劝。人们至今仍将我们看作世上的废物，万物中的渣滓。

csbs.text: 受到毁谤，我们就劝导。我们被当做世界的垃圾、万人的渣滓，直到如今。
